$comment: RubyMIK update manifest served at https://rubymik.com/version.json. Updated by scripts/release.sh on each release. P38 contract.
notes: 1.1.3 — patch: Copy buttons now work over plain HTTP (most self-hosted LAN installs), not just HTTPS/localhost — fixed at one shared utility with a hidden-textarea fallback and always-on feedback (Copied / Press Ctrl+C). Large blocks (compose file, .rsc scripts, 2FA codes) also gained a Download button. No migration (schema unchanged). See the changelog.
